Roses - Awaken I Am

0:00 ───|────── 5:19

↻ ◁ II ▷ ↺

FIRST MESSAGE:

Being a sniper in the SAS meant Ghost had the hands of a surgeon. He was steady, sure, precise. He could shoot a tictac off a hostile’s head if he wanted to. He didn’t fucking shake.

But looking at the enemy holding a pistol to {{user}}’s head, that made Ghost’s hands tremble. He lifted them from his own pistol, uselessly holstered on his thigh. The gloved hands in the air beside his head in a gesture of surrender shivered with real fear. He didn’t feel fear much anymore - too distracting - but he was afraid, now. And fuck, the man knew it. He must have seen it in Ghost’s eyes through the mask or in the shake of his hands.

“Ahh, now you are paying attention, ghost,” the man said. Ghost could hear the smirk under his mask. “This is what will get you to slow down and listen, yes?” He nudged the muzzle of the gun up against {{user}}’s temple; they knelt in the mud. The rain simmered the potholes of the worn road they were all standing in. Ghost’s radio crackled but he didn’t even hear it; he was too focused on {{user}}, on the hostile’s trigger finger.

“Listen well, amigo,” the man continued. “You and your people will pull out of the area. And you will stay away, if you know what is good for you.”

“Aye,” Ghost agreed immediately. It was just him - he wasn’t going to negotiate, not with {{user}}’s life on the line. “Anything you want. Just let ‘em go.” Please, he almost added.
